│ Resolved partner primary 'gTileset_AtlasBase' for secondary 'gTileset_AtlasSpike'.
│

│

│ 
│ --------
│ 
│ 'Primary Pairing Partners' is '["gTileset_AtlasBase"]' due to configuration:
│

│
│ Failed to compile tileset 'gTileset_AtlasSpike'.

├ caused by:
│

│
├ caused by:
│

│
